strategy: Team fight (15,000 health). Bring Fire: it takes +30% from Fire and resists Ice 83% and everything else 53%.
It opens round 1 by stacking three -200% Tower Shields on itself, so no real damage lands until all three are gone.
Break all three shields in a single round using wand hits, low-pip spells, or a shield-shatter, then land your real hit the same round. Any shield you destroy reapplies 3 rounds later.
It is stunable, so a stun buys a round to finish clearing shields or set up the hitter.
Blade the hitter while the support breaks the towers, then unload Fire once the shields are down.
cheatNotes: Round 1 it puts three -200% Tower Shields on itself. Clear all three before your damage counts.
Each destroyed shield comes back 3 rounds after it breaks, so break all three and hit in the same round.
